role: AST parsing and language discovery module for code analysis.
responsibility: This directory provides the infrastructure for parsing source code into abstract syntax trees (ASTs), extracting structural symbols and imports, discovering and resolving programming languages from file extensions, and managing language configurations and rule sets. It enables automatic code structure analysis across multiple languages.

children.role: AST parsing service that extracts structural symbols and imports from source code using language-specific rule sets loaded from YAML configuration files.
AST language discovery and lifecycle module that scans file collections, resolves programming languages via extension mapping, computes deltas between snapshots, and validates language support.
Stateful language configuration registry and dynamic language loader for the ArchSpine code analysis pipeline, managing AST-grep language bindings and file-to-language resolution.
Directory contains language-specific configuration files for defining pattern-based extraction rules for code structure analysis.
